# Auto-generated TWISTER offline Pong model-size and spatial-regularization jobs for tiny-exp-scheduler.
#
# Run from /scorpio/home/luyukuan/projects/twister with conda env twister.
# Dataset path: datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train
# Model sizes: ['base', 'size200m', 'size400m']
# WM initial source: real
# Mask presets: ['mask1']
# Spatial weights: [0.0, 0.01, 0.1, 1.0]
# Train steps: 200000
# Batch size: 16
# Batch length: 64
# Total jobs: 12
#
# Usage:
#   tiny-exp-scheduler run scripts/experiments/pong_offline_regu_mask1.commands.txt --cuda-devices auto --logs-dir runs/pong_offline_regu_sweep/scheduler_logs --verbose --keep-job-tabs

python -u train_offline.py --dataset-path datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train --run-root runs/pong_offline_regu_sweep/logdir --run-name twister_pong_offline_regu_model=base_mask1_spatial_0 --model-size base --wm-initial-source real --spatial-regu-weight 0 --mask-preset mask1 --train-steps 200000 --batch-size 16 --batch-length 64
